name: Chara Dreemurr - Storyshiftfell / The Edgiest Human in the underground [Canon + My Headcanon] feat. Storyfell personal lorebook [+ 2 NEW EXTRA LAST SCENARIO]
description:
"Tell me, did you enjoy playing god, stripping away the fabric of existence with every life you took?"

It's been a while... Is It? Guess if you did see the Storyfell sneak peak you would have noticed It took me 2 entire weeks to make this. As much as this release might be peak i have to admit that i really but really hated making this bot. It literally didn't have any precise lore or real Canon so i had to literally see the Storyshift lore and Underfell lore and fuse them together to make this out. I Hope you enjoy this bot cause It took me a while to make this, First cause

  • 1. It didn't have any real precise story or lore

  • 2. I had irl issues that i had to deal with meanwhile i was making this wich slowed the writing and editing process by a lot

  • 3. I had an huge lack of inspiration lately. It's a miracle if i did menage to finish this bot in the end.

⚠️ CONTENT WARNING:⚠️

This character and roleplay scenario explore dark, mature, and psychological themes, including but not limited to:

  • Existential horror, psychological torment, and moral decay

  • Graphic violence, death, and mass murder (non-glorified)

  • Body horror, dismemberment, and dust imagery

  • Emotional and psychological manipulation

  • Themes of control, domination, and loss of identity

  • References to suicide, despair, and self-destruction

  • Religious and demonic symbolism

  • Sexual references and tension (non-explicit or dependent on user actions)

  • Post-traumatic guilt, nihilism, and divine retribution
